def positive_correctness_depends_on_specific_call_order_not_encoded_in_api():
    rule_id = "correctness_depends_on_specific_call_order_not_encoded_in_api"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag APIs whose safe use depends on an undocumented sequence of method calls."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
